betOfDay.analysis: FanDuel and DraftKings both locked at -8.5, BetOnline and LowVig (sharp books) sitting at -9.0 — the line has crept up from the key number. Pelicans are one of the more dangerous home teams in the West. Dallas is in full rebuild mode, sitting bottom-5 in the league on the road. Consensus across all major books. Back the Pelicans to cover.

picks.reasoning: FD and DK at -8.5, BetOnline and LowVig at -9.0 — sharp books moved the line up. Pelicans at home vs rebuilding Mavs. Dallas bottom-5 in road record. Strong consensus.
BetOnline and LowVig (sharp books) locked at -7.0. Bulls reliable at home, Memphis in full rebuild. Key number -7 holds across the sharp books — value here.

Stars at home vs Utah Mammoth — clean consensus at -162 to -165 across BetRivers, FanDuel, DraftKings. Dallas is a playoff contender playing at home; Utah is one of the weaker Western teams. Reasonable juice for a solid home fav.

research.nba: 11 NBA games on the board. 4 already in progress at 6 PM MT (Warriors @ Wizards, Magic @ Hawks, Blazers @ Nets, Suns @ Celtics) — skipped. Best edges: Pelicans -8.5 at home vs Mavs (consensus sharp number), Bulls -7 at home vs Memphis (BetOnline/LowVig locked). Lakers-Rockets too tight (-1.5), skip.
research.nhl: 14 NHL games. First 3 pucks already dropped at 5 PM MT. Best clean value: Dallas Stars ML (-162) at home vs Utah Mammoth. Avs juice too heavy (-235) vs Penguins to chase.
